• 3D match-3 puzzle game combining voxel physics with pixel art creation
  • Swap blocks to create matches, triggering chain reactions and power-ups
  • Completed art reveals as players match specific colored blocks
  • Features fluid background effects, particle explosions, and export/share functionality
    class Block { constructor(x, y, charKey, powerupType = 'none') { ... } }
    function findMatches() { ... } // Returns matching sequences

VOXEL CRASH is a browser-based match-3 game where players swap colored blocks to create matches while simultaneously revealing pixel art. The game features 3D voxel physics, chain reactions, power-ups, and a dynamic fluid background that changes colors based on remaining art pieces. Players can import custom artwork, export completed cards, and share their creations.
